content.question: What is the true population prevalence of autism spectrum disorder and other neurodevelopmental/learning differences among Hungarian children, independent of administrative identification and diagnostic-practice variation?
content.reduction_path: Commission a population-representative epidemiological screening study (e.g., birth cohort or stratified random school sample) using standardized diagnostic instruments (e.g., ADOS-2, DSM-5 criteria) and compare screened prevalence to administrative registry data to quantify ascertainment bias and true-prevalence trends
